findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'community and destination zev infrastructure program' (6x); 'daq grant management system (gms)' (5x).

findings.description: The Level 2 Add On Funding Levels table introduces the column header 'Condition' which does not appear anywhere in the source PDF. The PDF column header reads 'Or (whichever is less)'.
findings.evidence: PDF page 10 table column header: 'Or (whichever is less)'. HTML table header: '<th scope="col">Condition</th>' with cell data 'or (whichever is less)'. The word 'Condition' is fabricated.

findings.description: The link for the program information URL has an href that does not appear in the PDF. The PDF shows the URL 'https://deq.nc.gov/VW-Community-Destination' but the HTML wraps it in an <a> tag with a different, longer href that is not visible anywhere in the PDF text.
findings.evidence: PDF page 40 text: 'https://deq.nc.gov/VW-Community-Destination'. HTML href: 'https://www.deq.nc.gov/news/events/volkswagen-settlement-community-and-destination-zero-emission-vehicle-infrastructure-program'. The href URL is not present in the source PDF text.

findings.description: The DC Fast Funding Levels table structure was reorganized. In the PDF, 'Or (whichever is less)' appears once as a vertically spanning element between the percentage column and dollar amount column for each property type. In the HTML, this text is repeated and appended to each dollar amount cell.
findings.evidence: PDF page 9: 'Or (whichever is less)' is a single element spanning rows between 100% and the dollar amounts. HTML: Each cell reads e.g. '$67,500 Or (whichever is less)' with the qualifier text embedded in each data cell rather than as a separate structural element.

findings.description: The city/urban skyline photograph from the bottom portion of PDF page 1 (title slide) is missing from the HTML. Only the lighthouse/coastal landscape image from the top portion is included.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 has two distinct photographs: a coastal scene with a lighthouse (top) and a city skyline at night (bottom, appearing to show Asheville). The HTML only has one image for page 1 content: .
